author: Reece
name: SunoCog
short: Queue Suno share links into Red Audio.
description: A Red cog repository containing SunoCog, which resolves public Suno song links and queues them into the core Audio cog.
install_msg: Load `audio` first, then load `sunocog`. You can use `[p]play <share_url>` for Suno links, or `[p]suno <share_url>` as a fallback.
